grade_notes: Excellent comprehensive report covering all 6 major competitors with detailed profiles including company overview, market position, specific product differentiators (Davis AI, Smartscape, OpenTelemetry-native), concrete pricing models (per-host, per-GB, infrastructure units), and strategic analysis. Executive summary effectively distills key findings. Comparison matrix provides clear side-by-side evaluation. Market trends section covers OpenTelemetry adoption, AI/ML integration, platform consolidation, cloud-native migration, consumption-based pricing, and security-observability convergence - all connected to competitive dynamics. Report structure is professional with clear hierarchy, consistent formatting, and useful summary table. Pricing details are specific enough for procurement comparison.
